title: Doe manifest-shape simfabric wall-clock ceiling
description: Schema for `config/manifest-simfabric-budget.json`. The ceiling file is consumed by `bench/tools/check_simfabric_budget_gate.py` as the manifest-shape full-graph dispatch precondition: the predicted simfabric wall-clock budget (predicted-wallclock receipt at `bench/out/r3-1-31b-manifest-simfabric-predicted-wallclock/budget.json`) must be calibrated AND under the ceiling before dispatch is allowed. Until per-kernel manifest-shape dispatch supplies the throughput calibration constant, `calibrationStatus` is the literal sentinel `<bootstrap-pending-rung-3>` (kept for contract stability) and the gate refuses launch regardless of numeric ceiling.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this schema. Currently 1.

artifactKind.description: Receipt class identifier; used by aggregation tooling.

calibrationStatus.description: State of the throughput calibration that backs the numeric ceilings. The literal sentinel `<bootstrap-pending-rung-3>` (kept for contract stability) means the values were chosen before any per-kernel manifest-shape calibration receipt landed; the gate denies launch in this state. Once per-kernel manifest-shape dispatch produces a calibration constant, set to a sha256 hex digest of the calibration receipt that supplied it.

calibrationSourcePath.description: Optional repo-relative path to the calibration receipt that produced the constant. Recorded once `calibrationStatus` is a sha256.

ceilings.description: Per-aggregate cycle ceilings. The gate compares the predicted-wallclock receipt's `grandPredictedCycles` against `grandPredictedCycles` here, and (when both sides are present) each phase's `predictedCycles` against `perPhase[phase]`.

grandPredictedCycles.description: Hard ceiling on `grandPredictedCycles` from the predicted-wallclock budget receipt. The receipt's value must be ≤ this number for the gate to allow launch.

perPhase.description: Optional per-phase ceiling map (e.g. `{ "prefill": ..., "decode": ... }`). When present, each phase's `predictedCycles` is compared against the corresponding entry; unknown phases fall through to the grand-total ceiling.

rationale.description: Free-form note explaining how the ceiling was derived (which simfabric runner timeout it tracks, what calibration receipt set it).
